steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to explain the 50 Completers hiking challenge to a new audience. The explanation must define what 50 Completers means — reaching the highest point in all fifty US states with the Highpointers Club — and may use the examples to illustrate.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
B defines the challenge ('reached the highest points in all fifty US states') and offers Spruce Knob and Mount Elbert as illustrative high points. A only mentions two states (incomplete), C names In Suk Han but never defines '50 Completer,' and D describes one person's accomplishment without explaining the general challenge.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
